question.text: Is transfer of securities to the demat account of TM/CM for margin purposes (title transfer collateral arrangements) permitted?

answer.text: Yes, it is the standard method
Yes, but only with client's written consent
Yes, for amounts exceeding Rs. 50 lakhs only

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Transfer of securities to the demat account of the TM/CM for margin purposes (title transfer collateral arrangements) shall be prohibited. **The Trap:** Before the 2020 circular, title transfer was common practice, so option (b) might seem correct based on old practices. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series VIII covers the prohibition of title transfer for margin purposes. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** If a broker asks you to transfer securities to their account for margin, this is a violation — only margin pledge through the depository system is permitted.
